title: The Alliance Says Farewell to Wano
description: On pages 9–11, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Nami, Unknown person #9, Wano Citizens, Momonosuke as Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.
scene: Wano celebrates liberation while Momonosuke becomes shogun, Green Bull threatens the island, and the alliance prepares to depart.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There may be some things I can shed light on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's all an old codger like me is good for anyway.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When that's done, I implore you to let me live anonymously among the people...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...in this new era you have ushered in.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Absolutely! Just knowing you're alive out there is a great comfort for us!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, I didn't get the chance to see it myself,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't you torch the blueprints for that thing, frankly?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah, Plutton. It's an ancient weapon named after a god.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought you'd say that. Still, I can't help but wonder....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why would open want to unleash it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Did you say that mature ladies are...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's me, shinobu!! I know, I'm nothing but skin and bones after that accident.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big bro! Big bro! I'm gonna be Shinobu's apprentice!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Think I can get strong enough to join your crew next time we meet?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sure, if you keep up on your nonjutsu training! SHISHISH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: First passion, now this! There's a certain someone who'd love to hear about this!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: My LORD, we have finished the restoration plans...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: The necessary funds have also been calculated.

summary: This part advances the Wano Aftermath through 40 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
